name: Barbecued Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the steak on both sides with a wooden mallet or the edge of a heavy plate.
2. Mix together lemon juice and mustard, then spread evenly over both sides of the steak. Allow it to stand for 4-5 hours at room temperature.
3. Broil the steaks about 4 inches above glowing coals on a barbecue grill for 4-5 minutes on each side, or until the desired level of doneness is reached. The lemon juice and mustard will not be distinctly noticeable; they simply enhance the flavor of the steak.
